content.en:
"I didn't expect that besides me, there were other extra-dimensional realms that snatched the multi-dimensional treasure gourd!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Behind that battle of the Fourth Realm, there was a strong man in the late stage of the Fourth Realm, and he also practiced an innate multi-dimensional Dao body, and the realm reached the first level of the Xiaocheng realm, relying on strong strength and strange means, he snatched a multi-dimensional treasure from many Fourth Realms, and only paid the price of minor injuries and fled.

And the extra-dimensional creatures are said to have snatched away two ~ multi-dimensional treasures.

In addition, Ye Tian snatched a multi-dimensional treasure gourd, which removed four multi-dimensional treasure gourds.

Those overlord-level extra-dimensional forces only snatched two multi-dimensional treasures.

There are quite a few overlord-level extra-dimensional forces participating this time, but there are only two multi-dimensional treasures, which can only be used in turn.

In case there is an even more powerful existence coming, they may not be able to keep these two multi-dimensional treasures!

"It has nothing to do with me, I got a multi-dimensional treasure gourd, enough for me to use!"

Ye Tian smiled.

......

Terran.

Ye Tian brought back the Duowei Treasure Hurd, and used the fourth layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique to cover his breath, which was safer.

Then, he started using the Duowei Bao Hu.

The multi-dimensional treasure bottle can condense the essence of the multi-dimensional treasure bottle, but unlike the multi-dimensional treasure bottle, the multi-dimensional treasure bottle can use the flesh and blood of the extra-dimensional realm to condense the multi-dimensional essence, but the multi-dimensional treasure bottle cannot do this.

Duowei Baohu needs some special and rare resources to condense the essence of Duowei Baohu, and Ye Tian does not have such special resources for the time being, such special resources, it is estimated that even the Jiucai Chamber of Commerce does not have much, and not even necessarily.

Ye Tian didn't expect to find these special resources, he was going to take the simplest way to nourish the multi-dimensional treasure gourd with the Extradimensional Realm Origin in his body.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian placed this multi-dimensional treasure in the extra-dimensional realm in his body, and mobilized the origin of the extra-dimensional realm in his body to nourish it.

If the Origin of the Transcendent Dimension in the body is not mobilized much, it can be gradually recovered after a long period of time, and the treasure that restores the origin will recover even faster.

However, if it is consumed too much, it will be difficult to recover, and it will even cause the extradimensional realm in the body to be shattered.

"The transcendental realm in the body is shattered, and it can be restored with the multi-dimensional healing essence of the three realms, and the lord of the Shangyue Realm will recover, but it will affect the foundation, and there is no hope of continuing to break through. If it continues to be broken for the second time, I am afraid that it will not be able to recover completely. Under normal circumstances, no third or fourth realm would dare to consume a large amount of the extradimensional realm origin in the body to nourish the multi-dimensional treasure gourd, so they could only take their time. "

Ye Tian can't wait, taking his time is not his style.

"Nourish me!"

Ye Tian mobilized almost all the origin of the transcendent realm in his body to pour into the multi-dimensional treasure gourd, covering the multi-dimensional treasure gourd, and frantically nourishing and refining the multi-dimensional treasure gourd.

Under this nourishment, the multi-dimensional treasure is gradually bred.

Time passed, and several extradimensional epochs passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's duplicate body collapsed and fell, but inside this multi-dimensional treasure gourd nourished six drops of the multi-dimensional treasure essence of the three realms.

"Sacrificing a replica body, consuming all the extra-dimensional realm origin in the body, only six drops of the Three-Realm Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence have been nourished, if you take your time, I am afraid that thousands of extra-dimensional eras may not be able to nourish a drop of the Three-Realm Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

It seems that after those Fourth Realms have obtained the Multi-Dimensional Treasure Gourd, they will not be able to obtain a single drop of the Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence in a short period of time, and the speed they have accumulated will definitely not be comparable to their own.

Moreover, there are quite a few of those Fourth Realms, and they are even rarer when apportioned.

"Try the effect of the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence!"

Ye Tian took out a drop of multi-dimensional treasure essence, and after swallowing it in one gulp, he used the Jiaye wisdom body to absorb and refine this drop of multi-dimensional treasure essence.

Rumble!!!!

After the multi-dimensional treasure essence was integrated into Ye Tian's body, it quickly refined the wisdom body of the Jiaye body.

His Ka Ye wisdom body was as if he had been hungry for countless days, frantically absorbing the energy of the multi-dimensional treasure essence, making the Ka Ye wisdom body more and more powerful.

"It's such a powerful effect, usually penance, the Ka Ye wisdom body is like no progress, but now I feel obvious progress!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

Of course, his Ka Ye wisdom body is still at the first level of entry, and if he wants to be promoted to the Xiaocheng realm, it is not something that can be done with a single drop of the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence!

0 for flowers0

Another period of time passed, and Ye Tian gradually absorbed and refined the six drops of the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Essence.

However, his Kasa wisdom body was still at the first level of entry.

"It probably takes about twenty drops of the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Essence to have any hope of elevating the Jiaye Wisdom Body to the realm of the first layer of Xiaocheng!" Ye Tian estimated.

Even it is difficult for him to elevate the Ka Ye wisdom body, and even if other extra-dimensional realms have cultivated the innate multi-dimensional Dao body, it is difficult to elevate them!

This is only the first layer of the innate multi-dimensional Dao body Xiaocheng realm, and if you want to ascend to the Dacheng realm, the difficulty is even more terrifying.

"It's too difficult to elevate the Innate Multi-Dimensional Dao Body, but fortunately I got the Multi-Dimensional Treasure Gourd, otherwise there would be no hope of ascending for countless years!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the days that followed, he would continue to sacrifice a replica body to condense the essence of the Three Realms Multi-Dimensional Treasure Hurd, and once it was condensed, he would let other replica bodies improve the Ka Ye Wisdom Body.

In this way, one extradimensional era after another passed.

In the blink of an eye, dozens of extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Jiaye wisdom body has finally ushered in a transformation, and it is about to transform into the realm of the first layer of Xiaocheng.

Rumble!!!!!

As another drop of the multi-dimensional treasure essence was absorbed by him, his Kasa Leaf wisdom body began to transform.

Countless energies were absorbed by him and became the nourishment of the Kaye wisdom body, and the Kaye wisdom body continued to transform, and his physical body became stronger and stronger, and his body became more and more tenacious.

It wasn't until a long time later that his Kasa wisdom body truly broke through!

......

"Phew, I have finally broken through the Ka Ye wisdom body to the first layer of Xiaocheng realm, and now my multi-dimensional wisdom light effect will definitely far surpass before, and it will be easier to improve the extradimensional rules!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Of course.

He is definitely not satisfied with the first layer of the Kasa Leaf Wisdom Body, he still needs to raise it to the Dacheng Realm, at most hundreds of extradimensional eras, his Ka Ye Wisdom Body will inevitably be able to ascend to the Dacheng Realm.

"Keep cultivating!"

Ye Tian muttered.
